rawAssistant: East Road's still a mess from yesterday's storm, but it's clearer now that the mist's lifted. North Road looks safer, though – fewer signs of trouble. If you're heading north, I'd advise taking the old oak's eastern path – it avoids most of the worst of the debris and mud.
